subtitle_request: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
sent_message: If that email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly. The link is valid for 1 hour.
password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset_success: Password changed successfully. You can now log in.
error_invalid: This reset link is invalid or has already been used.
error_expired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
